name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-3
title: test-templates-have-version.py uses substring match; cannot distinguish _template_version from template_version
description: test/test-templates-have-version.py just searches for substring 'template_version' which matches '_template_version' as a substring. The test cannot enforce a consistent template_version key naming convention. Strengthen by checking for exact JSON/frontmatter key match or by enforcing a particular field shape per template type (JSON, MD frontmatter, txt).
